rationale.ai-review: Independent LLM verifier judges milestones, rejects defects, and has documented reliability limits.
rationale.rules-based-checks: Tests, CI results, benchmarks, and similarity metrics ground verification verdicts.
rationale.remediation-gating: Failed verification triggers bounded corrective rounds before milestone acceptance.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Dashboard supports asynchronous issues, monitoring, pause/resume, and emergency reset.
rationale.agent-scope-drift: Milestones, phase isolation, bounded tasks, budgets, and reset constrain divergence.
rationale.provenance-auditability: Persistent histories, reports, streamed actions, issues, commits, and PRs enable review.
rationale.quality-debt: Evaluation documents regressions, architectural defects, and missing requirements in generated software.
rationale.framework: Three-phase orchestration architecture is designed for continuous development pipelines.
rationale.built-system: Authors implemented and evaluated an open-source working system across multiple projects.
